title: OrderHub rollback exceeds the maintenance window in dry-run
description: In the first end-to-end dry-run, the OrderHub rollback procedure took ~5.5 hours — longer than the 4-hour maintenance window the runbook commits to. A rollback that doesn't fit the window means we cannot safely schedule the cutover.
steps_to_reproduce: Run the OrderHub cutover dry-run against the Northwind test env
Measure elapsed time to a fully restored on-prem state
expected: Rollback completes within the 4-hour maintenance window.

sources.note: issue found while validating the runbook deliverable
